'''√b-h-?''' ('''bha''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:see|see]]".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-h-?
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:see|see]]
|-
! Citation form
| √b-h-?
|-
! Lemma
| bha
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thibaha?|thibaha?]] || [[word:jibaha?|jibaha?]] || [[word:shibaha?|shibaha?]] || [[word:kibaha?|kibaha?]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthubaha?|thuthubaha?]] || [[word:jujubaha?|jujubaha?]] || [[word:shushubaha?|shushubaha?]] || [[word:kukubaha?|kukubaha?]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thubaha?|thubaha?]] || [[word:jubaha?|jubaha?]] || [[word:shubaha?|shubaha?]] || [[word:kubaha?|kubaha?]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thubaha?|thubaha?]] || [[word:jubaha?|jubaha?]] || [[word:shubaha?|shubaha?]] || [[word:kubaha?|kubaha?]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thebaha?|thebaha?]] || [[word:jebaha?|jebaha?]] || [[word:shebaha?|shebaha?]] || [[word:kebaha?|kebaha?]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothobaha?|thothobaha?]] || [[word:jojobaha?|jojobaha?]] || [[word:shoshobaha?|shoshobaha?]] || [[word:kokobaha?|kokobaha?]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thobaha?|thobaha?]] || [[word:jobaha?|jobaha?]] || [[word:shobaha?|shobaha?]] || [[word:kobaha?|kobaha?]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thobaha?|thobaha?]] || [[word:jobaha?|jobaha?]] || [[word:shobaha?|shobaha?]] || [[word:kobaha?|kobaha?]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thæbaha?|thæbaha?]] || [[word:jæbaha?|jæbaha?]] || [[word:shæbaha?|shæbaha?]] || [[word:kæbaha?|kæbaha?]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathabaha?|thathabaha?]] || [[word:jajabaha?|jajabaha?]] || [[word:shashabaha?|shashabaha?]] || [[word:kakabaha?|kakabaha?]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thabaha?|thabaha?]] || [[word:jabaha?|jabaha?]] || [[word:shabaha?|shabaha?]] || [[word:kabaha?|kabaha?]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thabaha?|thabaha?]] || [[word:jabaha?|jabaha?]] || [[word:shabaha?|shabaha?]] || [[word:kabaha?|kabaha?]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shabaha?|shabaha?]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshabaha?|goshabaha?]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishabaha?|gokishabaha?]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shabaha?nü|shabaha?nü]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshabaha?nknü|goshabaha?nknü]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishabaha?nü|gokishabaha?nü]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shabaha?shë|shabaha?shë]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshabaha?nkshë|goshabaha?nkshë]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishabaha?shë|gokishabaha?shë]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabaha?ro|shabaha?ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabaha?nkro|goshabaha?nkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabaha?ro|gokishabaha?ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shabaha?mu|shabaha?mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabaha?nkmu|goshabaha?nkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabaha?mu|gokishabaha?mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shabaha?sher|shabaha?sher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshabaha?nksher|goshabaha?nksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishabaha?sher|gokishabaha?sher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shabaha?ng|shabaha?ng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshabaha?nkng|goshabaha?nkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishabaha?ng|gokishabaha?ng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shabaha?ya|shabaha?ya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshabaha?nkya|goshabaha?nkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishabaha?ya|gokishabaha?ya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shabaha?yam|shabaha?yam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshabaha?nkyam|goshabaha?nkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishabaha?yam|gokishabaha?yam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shabaha?nüshë|shabaha?nüshë]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshabaha?nknüshë|goshabaha?nknüshë]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishabaha?nüshë|gokishabaha?nüshë]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabaha?nüro|shabaha?nüro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabaha?nknüro|goshabaha?nknüro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabaha?nüro|gokishabaha?nüro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shabaha?nümu|shabaha?nümu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabaha?nknümu|goshabaha?nknümu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabaha?nümu|gokishabaha?nümu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shabaha?shënü|shabaha?shënü]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshabaha?nkshënü|goshabaha?nkshënü]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishabaha?shënü|gokishabaha?shënü]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabaha?shëro|shabaha?shëro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabaha?nkshëro|goshabaha?nkshëro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabaha?shëro|gokishabaha?shëro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shabaha?shëmu|shabaha?shëmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabaha?nkshëmu|goshabaha?nkshëmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabaha?shëmu|gokishabaha?shëmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shabaha?ronü|shabaha?ronü]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshabaha?nkronü|goshabaha?nkronü]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishabaha?ronü|gokishabaha?ronü]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shabaha?roshë|shabaha?roshë]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshabaha?nkroshë|goshabaha?nkroshë]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishabaha?roshë|gokishabaha?roshë]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shabaha?romu|shabaha?romu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabaha?nkromu|goshabaha?nkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabaha?romu|gokishabaha?romu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shabaha?munü|shabaha?munü]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshabaha?nkmunü|goshabaha?nkmunü]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishabaha?munü|gokishabaha?munü]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shabaha?mushë|shabaha?mushë]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshabaha?nkmushë|goshabaha?nkmushë]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishabaha?mushë|gokishabaha?mushë]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabaha?muro|shabaha?muro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabaha?nkmuro|goshabaha?nkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabaha?muro|gokishabaha?muro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki active verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c0cba0}}
